Current Apr 2026 stack per protocol site: 4 Blueprint pills + 7 daily Rx (Armour Thyroid 60mg, Levothyroxine 100mcg, Minoxidil 3.75mg, Acarbose 200mg, Tadalafil 5mg, Candesartan 8mg, Jardiance 10mg) + Repatha 140mg biweekly. True beluga imported-only; Amazon.in has USDA organic 12oz×2; kept ₹60 with understanding that 'black lentils (beluga)' label may be sabut urad at that price point

computable_from_prior_rounds.rationale: 2 tsp ≈ 10g. Prior verified_prices_v2 records Kashmiri walnut at ₹22-26/15g (₹1,466-1,733/kg). Median ₹1,600/kg → ₹16/10g. Dossier ₹25 overstated by ~55%.

2 tbsp blended ≈ 20g (10g chia + 10g flax). Prior v2 records chia at ₹3-8/10g (median ₹5), flax at ₹0.5-1/tbsp (~₹1/10g). Blended ₹5-7; median ₹6. Dossier ₹30 overstated by ~5×. MAJOR finding — cross-check chia/flax portion size assumption in dossier; if Bryan actually takes larger portion, dossier is right.

priors_from_training_needs_live_verify.flag: Likely ~10-20% overstated. 250g retail ~₹200-₹360/kg = ₹50-₹90. Live fetch required.
LIKELY OVERSTATED 3-5×. 150g retail ~₹7-15 at loose mandi, ~₹10-15 packed. Dossier ₹45 only plausible in off-season spike. PRIORITY FIX.
True beluga imported-only (Urban Platter, Nature's Basket). Recommend DUAL-PRICE entry: imported beluga + sabut urad substitute with explicit flag.
Niche category. Sunflower lecithin 200g pack ₹600-1,200 → ₹15-30/5g. Live fetch needed — soy lecithin cheaper but chemically distinct, do not silently substitute.

Macadamia milk NOT available at scale in India. Milkadamia imports sporadic at Urban Platter (~₹85-115/100ml). Dossier ₹180 plausible for imported but NOT for a replicable Indian stack. Recommendation: keep with 'imported only' flag AND add almond milk substitute row.
Raw Pressery 250ml cold-pressed pomegranate ~₹150-200 → ₹36-48/60ml. Dossier ₹70 overstated. B Natural/Paper Boat tetra packs don't qualify as fresh-pressed.

bj_pill_stack_findings_CRITICAL.dossier_claim_status: FRAGILE — partially_verifiable with three structural issues

fragility_1_stale_protocol.detail: Bryan Johnson publicly announced rapamycin discontinuation October 2024 (X and blog) after DunedinPACE and other biomarkers worsened. Status as of Apr 2026 capture date unknown.
fragility_1_stale_protocol.impact: Rapamycin (Biocon Rapacan) contributes ~₹167/day amortised at 13mg/week. If discontinued, pill stack drops from ₹620 to ~₹443/day. Dossier overstated by ~40%.
fragility_1_stale_protocol.action: Fresh fetch of protocol.bryanjohnson.com 'What I Take' page required before launch. Devil's Advocate MEDIUM attack is legitimate until this is resolved.

fragility_2_double_counting.detail: Pill stack ₹620 likely double-counts compounds already priced in adjacent line items: Longevity Mix ₹387 + Essential Capsules ₹215 + Essential Softgels ₹165. Blueprint Essentials and Longevity Mix together bundle: creatine, ashwagandha, collagen, TMG, taurine, glycine, lithium, Vitamin D3, K2 MK-7, EPA/DHA, zinc, curcumin, ginger, garlic, CoQ10, B-complex.
fragility_2_double_counting.impact: If Indian-replica pill stack also contains Indian OTC swaps for these bundled compounds, ₹200-300/day is double-counted. claims.json is silent on pill-stack scope definition.
fragility_2_double_counting.action: R1 must define pill-stack scope as either (a) Rx-only + non-Essential compounds, OR (b) comprehensive with Essentials/Longevity Mix marked as $0 line items. Current ambiguity is ship-blocking.

fragility_3_rx_availability_friction.detail: Rx-only compounds: Acarbose ~₹90/day (12 tabs, Glucobay 50mg × 4/meal × 3 meals), Metformin ~₹1.6/day, Rapamycin ~₹167/day (if still taken). Total Rx-gated ~₹259/day = 42% of ₹620 claim. Plasmalogens (Prodrome Sciences) unavailable in India, ~₹200/day import-only. Lithium orotate FSSAI-ambiguous. Spermidine thin Indian supply.
fragility_3_rx_availability_friction.impact: Honest consumer UX must disclose that the majority-by-cost of the pill stack requires prescription or import. Not an arithmetic error but a replicability claim that degrades under scrutiny.
fragility_3_rx_availability_friction.action: Split ₹620 into three sub-buckets for consumer display: Rx-gated, OTC-available, import-only. See proposed structure below.

bj_pill_stack_findings_CRITICAL.recommendation: Reduce bj_pill_stack display value to ₹443 (excluding rapamycin pending stale-protocol resolution) OR keep ₹620 with explicit 'includes rapamycin; may be stale' footnote. Split display into Rx/OTC/Import buckets. Resolve double-count with claims.json scope definition. Estimated net effect on BJ replica daily total: neutral to -₹177 (3,062 → 2,885 if rapamycin dropped).

cacao_biology_blocker_RESOLVED_PATH.finding: No independent HPLC flavanol assay exists for Mason & Co, Ariba, or Wakao. None of the brands publishes one. 'Matches Blueprint' claim is unsupported.

regulatory_risk.framework_primary: FSS (Advertising and Claims) Regulations 2018, Regulation 7 — Comparative Claims must be factually verifiable with documentary evidence, same-basis comparison
regulatory_risk.framework_secondary: FSS (Health Supplements, Nutraceuticals, Food for Special Dietary Use) Regulations 2022 — disease-risk-reduction claims require pre-approval
regulatory_risk.penalty_exposure: Section 53 of FSS Act 2006, misleading advertisement, up to ₹10 lakh (INR 10,00,000)

fda_reference_for_comparison.qualified_claim_language_paraphrased: Cocoa flavanols in high-flavanol cocoa powder may reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease (very limited scientific evidence)
fda_reference_for_comparison.note: FDA qualified claim does not transfer to Indian regulatory approval

cacao_biology_blocker_RESOLVED_PATH.proposed_rewrite_for_cacao_swap_card: Mason & Co, Ariba, and Wakao sell raw, non-alkalised cacao — a category that retains substantially more flavanols than Dutched cocoa. Brand-level flavanol content has not been independently assayed and will vary by bean origin, fermentation, and roast. Do not assume per-gram equivalence to Blueprint Cocoa Flavanols until an HPLC assay is published.

labs_identified_iso17025_nabl.name: CFTRI Mysore (CSIR)
labs_identified_iso17025_nabl.note: HPLC flavonoid capacity; external testing via Food Testing Lab; likely cheapest; slower turnaround

labs_identified_iso17025_nabl.name: Eurofins Analytical Services India
labs_identified_iso17025_nabl.note: NABL + ISO 17025; total polyphenols (Folin) + HPLC catechin/epicatechin; commercial rates

labs_identified_iso17025_nabl.name: Auriga Research (Delhi)
labs_identified_iso17025_nabl.note: NABL private lab; nutraceutical flavonoid panels

remediation_path_to_reinstate_matches_bl.scope_specification_for_quote_requests: Total flavanols (Folin-Ciocalteu or equivalent) + HPLC quantification of epicatechin and catechin monomers, method-validated, one retail sample per brand, ideally duplicate replicates
remediation_path_to_reinstate_matches_bl.estimated_cost_band_unverified: ₹5,000-25,000 per brand per panel at private NABL lab; CFTRI/NIN typically lower; confirm via written quote
remediation_path_to_reinstate_matches_bl.total_minimum_viable_spend: 3 brands × single replicate = ₹15,000-75,000; duplicate replicates preferable

round4_hero_impact.bj_replica_daily_after_round4_correction: If rapamycin dropped (-₹167), walnut corrected (-₹9), chia_flax corrected (-₹24), cauliflower plausibly corrected (-₹30), net ~-₹230 → ~₹2,830. If rapamycin retained, net ~-₹60 → ~₹3,000.
round4_hero_impact.headline_stability: '~12×' may round to '~11×' after round-4 corrections. Both are defensible. Recommend hero language shift from '~12×' to '~10-12× cheaper per day' OR keep '~12×' and document that the corrected number sits at the lower bound of the rounding.

urgent_actions_before_launch.item: Ship cacao-card rewrite immediately — resolves CRITICAL biology blocker + ₹10 lakh regulatory exposure. No web access needed, decision-ready.
Define bj_pill_stack scope in claims.json: Rx+unbundled OR comprehensive-with-zeros. Resolves HIGH severity double-count ambiguity.
Live-fetch protocol.bryanjohnson.com to resolve rapamycin status. Determines whether pill stack is ₹443 or ₹620.
Update hero number to reflect likely '~11×' or widen rounded headline to '~10-12×' after round-4 BJ-side corrections.

Live-fetch the 14 BJ replica items (6 Blueprint + 8 Indian retail) OR reframe Blueprint-branded entries as 'orientation only — Blueprint direct import'. Requires WebFetch grant to Claude or manual cart screenshots.
Commission HPLC flavanol assay at CFTRI (cheapest) or Eurofins (fastest) to eventually reinstate 'matches Blueprint' cacao claim if desired.
